name: color-by
description: Marker colouring ('color-by') and sizing ('size-by'), probed against MassFlow 3D 9.
base_syntax: plot item create marker color-by <contour|label> ... ; size-by <meanDiameter|pixels|uniform>

modes.syntax: color-by contour [above below interval log maximum minimum ramp reversed]
modes.description: Continuous colouring of the marker scalar field.
Categorical colouring by a named attribute (e.g. group).

notes: size-by scales each marker glyph (meanDiameter = by fragment size).
Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MassFlow 3D 9.
